nasb.text: And they prayed and said, “You, Lord, who know the hearts of all men, show which one of these two You have chosen

esv.text: And they prayed and said, “You, Lord, who know the hearts of all, show which one of these two you have chosen

cnv.text: 就禱告說：“主啊！你知道萬人的心，求你從這兩個人中，指明你要揀選誰，

csbs.text: 他们就祷告说：“主啊，你洞察每个人的心。求你从这两个人中，指明你所拣选的是哪一位，
